description_long: This object is a miniature airplane with a compact fuselage and short, straight wings extending from either side. The wings are positioned at a mid-level on the fuselage, and the tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The nose is rounded and the cockpit area is subtly indicated, suggesting a forward placement. The airplane appears to be constructed from a single, solid material with a smooth, hard surface and a dark coloration. There are no visible engines, landing gear, or detailed surface markings, giving it a simplified, stylized appearance.
description: A small, dark, stylized airplane with mid-mounted straight wings and a conventional tail, featuring a smooth, solid surface.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from the side, showing the mid-mounted wings and the vertical tail fin clearly.
description_view_1: A front view reveals the symmetrical wingspan and the rounded nose of the airplane.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, with the wings and tail fin visible in profile.
description_view_3: The rear view highlights the tail section, including the vertical and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted cockpit, enclosed, with no visible canopy or window details.
